Appearances:

Defendant Khaled Habbachi is present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Apr-29-2019 is vacated. (501)
